amendment.description: To provide for limitations on judgments, awards, and compromise settlements under section 1304 of title 31, United States Code.

action.text: Amendment SA 5740 ruled out of order by the chair.
Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5740, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 51 - 48. Record Vote Number: 162.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 313(b)(1)(a) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5740.
Amendment SA 5740 proposed by Senator Schiff to Amendment SA 5453. To provide for limitations on judgments, awards, and compromise settlements under section 1304 of title 31, United States Code.
